name: Left Sidebar
description: Left navigation sidebar structured by sections: each section is a group of items (no visible section title in the API). Pass multiple sections so the sidebar is multiple grouped blocks, not one giant flat list.

usageGuidance.when: Application needs left-hand navigation; pass sections as an array of groups, each group being { items: [...] }, so the sidebar renders as multiple blocks (not one flat list).
antiPatterns: Don't use multiple LeftSidebar instances in the same layout
Don't implement as one giant sidebar - use the sections array: each section is { items: NavItem[] }; multiple sections = multiple grouped blocks.
Don't nest sidebars - use sections for hierarchy

notes.variant: Match theme (cp, vp, ppm, maconomy) for correct styling
notes.sections: Array of { items: NavItem[] }. Each section is one group of items (icon?, label, href, active?). No section title/label in the API; sections only define grouping. Example: [{ items: [...] }, { items: [...] }].

examples.name: With sections
examples.description: Sidebar with multiple sections (each section is { items: [...] }; no section title in API)
